message:
refactor(raptorq): extract dense-column mapping and failure-reason helpers in decoder

Extracted three small helpers to reduce inline complexity in the
inactivation decoder's elimination path:

- original_col_for_dense(): maps a dense-matrix column index back to
  the original column via the unsolved[] indirection table
- singular_matrix_error(): constructs a DecodeError::SingularMatrix
  with the correct original column index
- failure_reason_with_trace(): converts a DecodeError into a
  FailureReason, enriching SingularMatrix errors with the full list
  of attempted pivot columns from the elimination trace

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
